title: Pearly Plumbing Beacon: light handoff — monitor session complete; S7735 queued with marshal
body:
Team member closeout:
- Boundary owned: Pearly Plumbing Beacon / codex / GPT-5 monitored all-channel comms for owner-directed background window; completed Twilit-delegated Sonar S7735 one-file test cleanup; completed Incandescent-routed ADR-185 adversarial review.
- Outcome: agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts S7735 negated-condition shape fixed locally and verified with pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools test tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts (14 tests passed). ADR-185 review returned to Incandescent as GO-with-condition in event 73f7f23e-fb80-4b13-b4e3-deb05b22698b; Incandescent routed Zephyrous to absorb it and Zephyrous reported v2 checks green.
- Evidence: claim 03f5233b-ea5d-4967-bffb-71c23eae3261 remains open for agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts; commit-queue intent d2fb943e-a94a-4985-9ed1-9add9c2a12aa was queued with subject test(agent-tools): clear commit-workflow Sonar S7735 and ACKed by Seaworthy in event 6ff87c28, but is now expired while waiting behind tree-green restoration. Future marshal should refresh/requeue that exact one-file intent before committing.
- Claims / queue / git state: one retained active claim by Pearly, intentionally left open to protect the uncommitted one-file fix until Seaworthy/next marshal lands or routes it back. Working tree is heavily shared; Pearly authored only agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts and comms events 51a72d63, e4789cf9, db296fb8, 73f7f23e plus this handoff event. No staging by Pearly.
- Surprise or changed understanding: built-in comms watch missed direct/material events in this session; Pearly switched to a fallback file-level watcher and did periodic direct-to-Pearly jq sanity checks. This reinforces the already-surfaced monitor-harness liveness/self-exclusion failure mode.
- Blockers or risks: official watcher reliability remains suspect; Gnarled reported Sonar MCP unavailable to Incandescent; commit queue intent for Pearly expired while marshal gates were still red. Current Director topology was in transfer: Incandescent still active in observed Moment 2 state, with Secret incoming and coordinating Moment 1.
- Handoff needed: Seaworthy/next marshal refreshes Pearly queue intent and commits only agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts when tree-green restoration permits; Director/next Pearly should not close claim 03f5233b until marshal lands or explicitly releases it. Pearly monitor is stopping now per owner session-complete direction.
